revisedPrompt:
Create exactly one PNG image for a game-development pixel-art asset.

Asset profile: snes16_platformer_v1
Preset: world_grass_variation_16
Asset kind/type: terrain-tile overlay tile set
Canvas: exact 64x64 px sprite sheet, 4 rows x 4 columns, 16 frames total, each frame exactly 16x16 px.

Critical layout:
- The sheet is a 4x4 grid, but DO NOT draw grid lines, borders, labels, IDs, UI, text, or watermark.
- Each 16x16 cell must contain mostly empty solid #FF00FF magenta background.
- In each cell, place exactly one small sparse decorative overlay cluster near the center.
- Every decoration must stay fully inside its own 16x16 cell, with consistent scale and identity across the sheet.
- Fill all unused space in every cell with flat, solid #FF00FF magenta.

Subject:
Sparse decorative overlay tile set for deep-green grass, top-down mythical-Japan palette. Include varied tiny decoration clusters: tiny white clover flowers, yellow dandelions, violet flowers, small mossy stones, sprouting grass tufts, fallen cherry petals. Make all 16 cells different but cohesive.

Pixel-art constraints:
- Crisp low-resolution 16-bit SNES-style pixel art.
- Hard pixel edges, no antialiasing blur, no painterly softness.
- Fine readable pixel clusters suitable for 16x16 game tiles.
- Bright cheerful palette, top-left light source.
- Use dark one-pixel outline where useful on stones/tufts/flowers.
- Delicate, sparse, readable at tiny size.

Tilemap/world-map quality:
- These are overlay decorations, not full grass base tiles.
- Avoid a visible checkerboard impression in final use by varying each decoration shape, color accent, edge breakup, and lighting.
- Avoid repeated square stamps and high-frequency checkerboard textures.
- Think sparse regional grassland embellishments, broad natural variation, not close-up village lawn detail.

Avoid completely:
No Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna characters, logos, symbols, likenesses, letter emblems, modern text, watermark, UI, samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, guns, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, birds, companion creatures, or any characters.
